mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments ( payment_id, booking_id, amount, payment_method, status ) VALUES ( #{paymentId}, #{bookingId}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, payment_id AS paymentId, booking_id AS bookingId, amount, payment_method AS paymentMethod, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM payments WHERE payment_id = #{paymentId}

SELECT id, payment_id AS paymentId, booking_id AS bookingId, amount, payment_method AS paymentMethod, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM payments WHERE booking_id = #{bookingId}
